title: Laurin vasquez’s CV
text:
Web developer, Computer Science student, Cambridge professor.

LinkedIn Profile


Stock Dashboard



Assistant Manager and Data Analyst Specialist || Collection Specialist || Computer Science & Engineer student || Web Developer



Data Analysis & Visualization

Dashboard Development (Power BI, Excel)

Web Development (Full-Stack JavaScript, React, Node.js)

Real-Time Systems & WebSockets

Database Management & SQL Optimization





April 2024 and present
Brigham Young University–Idaho.

Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

GPA: 3.88

Web Development (JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS; React, Vite, Node.js, Vue, Netlify)

Data Structures, Algorithms, and Object-Oriented Programming (Python, C#, JavaScript)

Database Management (MySQL Workbench, SQL Server)

Back-End Development (JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, C#)

WebSocket Handling





2025
Vasquez L, Data-driven dashboards for operational efficiency using Python and Power BI. (Stock Dashboard)


2026
Real-time dashboard system for monitoring performance metrics using WebSockets and Power BI, patent pending




Present
Brigham Young University–Idaho, Rexburg, ID

Assistant Manager — Data Analytics Specialist / Supervisor for Online Teaching Assistants
Analyzed operational data using Python and R to generate reports

Built Excel and Power BI dashboards for KPI tracking

Supervised and trained student teams

Previous
Brigham Young University–Idaho, Rexburg, ID

Assistant Manager — Logistics Specialist / Supervisor

Managed logistics operations, inventory tracking, and scheduling

Led teams and improved workflow efficiency

Previous
Scotia GBS (Scotiabank Group), Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic

Collections Specialist

Managed CRM systems and tracked customer accounts

Built dashboards and reduced reporting time by 30%

Queried SQL databases for performance insights
